## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss beehiiv platform optimization and growth strategies for GrowthX's AI Code newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implement gradual subscriber onboarding (7-10k batches) to maintain deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Leverage beehiiv's web version for SEO benefits and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Utilize boosts and recommendations features for strategic newsletter growth](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Fine-tune UTM parameters and analytics reporting for client updates](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

## Topics

### Subscriber Onboarding Strategy

  - [Create "not initial" segment for remaining 40k subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Export CSV, tag in 10k batches (A, B, C, D)](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Re-import to beehiiv with tags for controlled rollout](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Aim to add batch before next send (Tue/Wed)](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Web Version and Growth Tools

  - [Use beehiiv-hosted web version for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Select template (e.g., Putty) matching brand colors](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Create embed form for Augment Code's site footer](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Leverage SEO-optimized archive for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Boost Feature for Subscriber Acquisition

  - [Access via Grow \> Boosts \> New Offer](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Set custom CPA (avg. $2-$2.50, max \~$250)](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Define target audience and verification level](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Review and approve relevant boost requests](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Use category filter to gauge competitive CPAs](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Recommendations Feature

  - [New tool for cross-promotion between beehiiv newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Set top 4 recommended publications](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Potential for reciprocal recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Strategically rotate client recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

### UTM Parameters and Analytics

  - [Keep source as "beehiiv" or "newsletter"](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Update campaign parameter monthly if needed](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Utilize Google Analytics for detailed tracking](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Leverage beehiiv's built-in analytics for client reporting](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
